description: Migrated legacy feature-implementation gates into individual Codelab skill scripts.
steps: Replaced generic placeholder scripts with agent-exec.sh verification gates.
Deleted legacy .agents/workflows/feature-implementation files to remove duplication.
Integrated Red, Green, Refactor, and Audit gates into make_it_fail, make_it_pass, make_it_better, and audit_security.
Mapped ChiefCritic's critique.sh script to browser-verification and UI journey checks.
